title: DLSS Settings Catalog
description: Catalog of NVIDIA DLSS driver-profile (NVAPI) settings RenderPilot can write, with their DRS ids and value tables. Loaded by RenderPilot at runtime (bundled fallback, overridable from the local libraries directory / GitHub Pages).

schema_version.description: Catalog schema version. Bumped when structure changes incompatibly.

label.description: Short control label shown in the UI.

family.description: Grouping family for UI sectioning (sr=Super Resolution, fg=Frame Generation, rr=Ray Reconstruction).

nvapi_id.description: NVIDIA DRS setting id as a hex ('0x10E41DF3') or decimal string.

dll_kind.description: Set ONLY on forced-preset-letter settings; triggers DLL-version preset-manifest filtering of the value list.

description.description: Optional help text shown beside the control.

min_driver.description: Optional minimum driver-version hint (display only; not enforced).

default.description: DWORD shown when the setting is absent (no override), as a hex or decimal string. Must equal one of the values' dwords. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

wire.description: Wire-stable option value (unique within a setting).

dword.description: DRS DWORD value as a hex or decimal string (unique within a setting).
